_meta.name: Sporeus — Money
_meta.description: Dodo webhook events, payment failures, latency, tier changes. SLO S-8: 100% idempotent, <5s p95.
_meta.import_instructions: Axiom → Dashboards → New → Import JSON → paste this file

charts.title: Dodo webhook invocations by status (1h buckets)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where fn == "dodo-webhook" | summarize count() by bin(_time, 1h), status

charts.title: Payment webhook failure rate % (1h buckets)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where fn == "dodo-webhook" | summarize total = count(), errors = countif(status == "error") by bin(_time, 1h) | extend error_pct = round(errors * 100.0 / total, 2)

charts.title: Payment webhook latency — p50/p95/max (SLO S-8: p95 < 5 000 ms)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where fn == "dodo-webhook" | summarize p50 = percentile(duration_ms, 50), p95 = percentile(duration_ms, 95), max_ms = max(duration_ms) by bin(_time, 1h) | sort by _time desc

charts.title: Failed payment webhooks by error class (1h buckets)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where fn == "dodo-webhook" | where status == "error" | summarize failures = count() by bin(_time, 1h), error_class

charts.title: Report generation (paid tier) — success rate
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where fn == "generate-report" | summarize total = count(), ok = countif(status == "ok") by bin(_time, 1h) | extend success_pct = round(ok * 100.0 / total, 2)

charts.title: Report generation p95 latency (SLO: < 20 000 ms)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where fn == "generate-report" | summarize p95 = percentile(duration_ms, 95) by bin(_time, 1h) | sort by _time desc

charts.title: Total payment webhooks today
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where fn == "dodo-webhook" | where _time >= startofday(now()) | summarize count()

charts.title: Failed payment webhooks today
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where fn == "dodo-webhook" | where _time >= startofday(now()) | where status == "error" | summarize count()
